data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption in transit and at rest protects user data from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access control measures are in place to limit data exposure to unauthorized users.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control (RBAC) is enforced across systems.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Intrusion detection systems (IDS) monitor and analyze network traffic to identify suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: Employs IDS services like Snort in conjunction with machine learning algorithms.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security audits and penetration tests identify potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability assessments with platforms like Nessus and engagement with third-party security firms.

data.title: Account Authentication
data.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) enhances user account security.
data.technical_spec: Integration with authentication platforms like Auth0 for MFA options.
